what prize of Clotrimazole ?

The price of Clotrimazole varies depending on the formulation. 

- Clotrimazole Cream 1% (CANBEN) is priced at 203.00/ 15 g (as per the gazette).
- Clotrimazole Vaginal Tablet 100mg (Mycoril) is priced at 175.87/Tablet (as per the gazette).

Please note that prices may be subject to change, and it's always best to verify with the latest NMRA gazette for the most up-to-date information.

messages.content: Is the price of PARAMOL 500 subject to change over time?

what are The basic cold chain equipment includes

The basic cold chain equipment includes: 
• For vaccine storage: Refrigerators and Cold-rooms.
• For vaccine transport: Cold boxes, Vaccine carriers, Day-carriers, and Thermos flasks.
• For cold chain monitoring: Thermometers, Cold Chain Monitors, Vaccine Vial Monitors, Freeze Watch Monitors, and data loggers.
• For transport: Vehicles. 
(Source: Guidelines for Handling and Storage of vaccines.pdf, Page 2)

messages.content: what is the definition of Medicine

According to the NMRA gazette, a Medicine is defined as "Any Substance Or Mixture Of Substances Manufactured, Sold, Offered For Sale Or Represented For Use In The Diagnosis, Treatment, Mitigation Or Prevention Of Disease, Abnormal Physical States Or The Symptoms Thereof In Man Or Animal. Restoring, Correcting Or Modifying Functions Of Organs In Man Or Animal. A Medicine Or Combination Of Medicine Ready For Use And Placed On The Market Under A Special Name Or In A Characteristic Form, Both Patent And Non-Proprietary Preparations. A Product Made Out Of Medicinal Herbal Extract. Nutraceutical With Therapeutic Claims And Vaccines And Sera, but Does Not Include An Ayurvedic Medicine Or A Homoeopathic Medicine."

messages.content: is there any deadlines coming up ?

According to the documents, there are a few deadlines mentioned:

1. The extended grace period for the implementation of product-specific QR codes or barcodes on commercial packaging will end on 30th June 2026 (Source: Updated Labelling Requirement Amendment 04.pdf, PAGE: 1).
2. The requirement to affix printed or non-peelable stickers to each commercial pack, displaying the phrase “NMRA approved”, the details of the market authorization holder, and the retail price of the product, has been effective from 31 December 2024 (Source: Updated Labelling Requirement Amendment 04.pdf, PAGE: 1).
3. The Minister shall lay copies of the report and documents submitted by the Authority before Parliament within six months from the date of receipt of such report (Source: 66cdNational medicines regulatory authority act, no. 5 of 2015 - Eng.pdf, PAGE: 19).
4. Every regulation made by the Minister shall not later than three months after its publication in the Gazette, be brought before Parliament for approval (Source: 66cdNational medicines regulatory authority act, no. 5 of 2015 - Eng.pdf, PAGE: 87).
5. A prosecution for an offence under this Act or any regulation made thereunder shall not be instituted after the expiration of a period of three months from the date of detection of that offence (Source: 66cdNational medicines regulatory authority act, no. 5 of 2015 - Eng.pdf, PAGE: 87).

Regulatory Authority (NMRA) has decided to further extend the grace period for the implementation of product-specific QR codes or barcodes on commercial packaging. The extended grace period will commence on Ist of January 2026 and continue until 30" June 2026. hi
Hi

I cannot find information about the specific requirements and process for registering cosmetics in Sri Lanka, including the necessary documentation, fees, and timelines in the uploaded documents. (Source: cdd_regulations_05.pdf, PAGE: 3-4) 

However, I can provide some general information about the licensing of importers of cosmetics. According to the document, every person desirous of obtaining a licence to import any registered cosmetic shall make a separate application to the Authority in respect of each such cosmetic which he intends to import (Source: cdd_regulations_05.pdf, PAGE: 3). The application shall be substantially in Form A of Schedule IV (Source: cdd_regulations_05.pdf, PAGE: 3). 

Additionally, every licensed importer of cosmetics shall exhibit the licence issued to him under regulation 11 in a conspicuous place in the premises at which he sells, stores or distributes the cosmetics imported under that licence (Source: cdd_regulations_05.pdf, PAGE: 4). The Authority shall keep a register of all licensed importers of cosmetics and shall enter therein the name of the licensed importer, address of the premises, date of issue of the licence, and the number and data of the certificate of registration if any issued to him under the Business Names Ordinance (Chapter 149) (Source: cdd_regulations_05.pdf, PAGE: 4).
